tasks.label: Quick Test Scripts
tasks.command: rm -rf "$LOCALAPPDATA/Plutonium/storage/t6/mods/t6-health-overhaul/scripts" && mkdir -p "$LOCALAPPDATA/Plutonium/storage/t6/scripts/" && cp -r "${workspaceFolder}/src/scripts/"* "$LOCALAPPDATA/Plutonium/storage/t6/scripts/" && echo 'Deployed to global script folder.'
